name: payments
description: Backend for RD Shop Payments service

scripts.start:dev: cd ../.. && nest build common && NODE_ENV=development APP=payments nest start payments --watch
scripts.docker:build:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.docker:start:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up
scripts.docker:migrate:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm migrate
scripts.docker:down:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml down
scripts.docker:start:prod:debug: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_prod -f compose.yml --profile debug up app-debug
scripts.docker:migrate:prod: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_prod -f compose.yml run --rm migrate
scripts.docker:down:prod:debug: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_payments_prod -f compose.yml --profile debug down

author: Ihor Chernobai
